+# The Bridge Builder
+
+A young architect was commissioned to build a bridge over a rushing river.
+
+**Moral:** The best designs account for forces we hope never arrive.

+# The Forgotten Library
+
+In a village where books were scarce.
+
+**Moral:** Preservation begins with remembering what was never truly lost.

--- a/story-gamma.md
+++ b/story-gamma.md
@@
+# The Silent Teacher
+
+A young musician traveled far to study with a renowned master.
+
+- **Lesson 1:** True learning begins when you stop waiting.
+- **Lesson 2:** Silence is not absence of guidance.
+- **Lesson 3:** The master who gives you time reveals more.
